legacyApi.removalCondition: All post-JRN-011 lifecycle consumers must be migrated and a separately approved deprecation window must complete.

cleanupAssertions: Client list does not sum live item prices to derive the order total.
Client detail uses orderNumber, totalMinorUnits, statusTimeline, paymentStatusProjection, correlationId and version from order truth.
Client cancellation visibility consumes server allowedActions.
New JRN-011 clients never call the legacy create endpoint.
Legacy routes remain only to avoid breaking later lifecycle journeys during their separate migration.
